title: orobanche cooperi
intro:
Orobanche cooperi, also known as the Cooper's broomrape or yellow broomrape, is a species of broomrape, a type of parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by attaching to the roots of host plants.

It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orobanche cooperi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Orobanche cooperi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions.
